description: Input schema template for person-max-age check. Verifies a person's age is at or below a maximum threshold.

{personId}.description: A person whose age will be checked

dateOfBirth.description: The person's date of birth in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD)

personId.description: ID of the person to check (must match a key in situation.people)

maxAge.description: The maximum age allowed (in years, inclusive)

asOfDate.description: The date to calculate age as of (defaults to today if not provided)
